caption: The video features Sanjeev Mohan, identified as the Principal of SanjMo, speaking at MongoDB World 2022, an event held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. The setting appears to be a professional conference or seminar, with other attendees visible in the background, some seated and others standing. Sanjeev is dressed formally in a suit and is actively engaged in conversation, using hand gestures to emphasize his points. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text on the screen. The overall atmosphere suggests a discussion focused on technology, data management, or related topics pertinent to the MongoDB community.
